message:
Add ANSI generation and render cycle benchmarks

Extend benches/renderer.rs with:
- ansi_simple_text: Basic ANSI text output
- ansi_styled_multiline: Multi-line styled text
- ansi_cell_by_cell_80x24: Cell-by-cell worst case
- prepare_frame_80x24: Frame preparation with box drawing
- full_cycle_with_ansi_80x24: Complete render cycle simulation

Closes bd-1j0.4

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
